title: Carr/Johnson Washington DC Travel and Calendar Records, July 2025

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All calendar entries, meeting invitations, and scheduling records for Attorney General Christopher Carr from July 1, 2025 through July 31, 2025, including the name, date, location, and attendees of any meetings, events, or engagements in Washington D.C.
All calendar entries, meeting invitations, and scheduling records for Travis Johnson, Chief of Staff to the Attorney General, from July 1, 2025 through July 31, 2025, including the name, date, location, and attendees of any meetings, events, or engagements in Washington D.C.
All travel expense reports, reimbursement requests, hotel receipts, and transportation records for Christopher Carr and Travis Johnson for any travel to Washington D.C. during July 2025.

This request encompasses records held on any device or platform used for official business, including personal devices and personal email accounts used to conduct state business, pursuant to O.C.G.A. § 50-18-70.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar
